LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT SOPHIA M. NGUYEN'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS OFF CALENDAR. ON NOVEMBER 24, 2025, THE CLERK ENTERED A DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF THE ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. THUS, THE INSTANT MOTION, WHICH CHALLENGES PLAINTIFF'S PURPORTED SERVICE OF THE NOW-DISMISSED COMPLAINT, IS NOW MOOT AND, THEREFORE, ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Sophia M. Nguyen
Off Calendar Nov-26-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Sophia M. Nguyen's unopposed Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is OFF CALENDAR.

On November 24, 2025, the clerk entered a dismissal without prejudice of the entire action of all parties and all causes of action. Thus, the instant motion, which challenges Plaintiff's purported service of the now-dismissed complaint, is now moot and, therefore, ordered off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
